name: Bauwerk Boen Group
message: Bauwerk Boen Group is, according to the assessment of the BauwerkBoen management, Europe's leading developer, manufacturer and supplier of parquet flooring in the premium segment as well as the second-largest market participant in wood flooring. 40Gb of theirdata will be available here soon for downloading. Lots of contracts, agreement (including confidential ones), employee files and so on.
